voice_observations.voiceover_text: Hi, this is Shraddha, I'm the founder of Terribly Real and you may know me from my collaborations with Adidas, Penn State, Porsche. But let me tell you where I was two years ago. It was 2023, I still had my 9-to-5 and I was illustrating on the side, out of passion, always have been. And then one fine day I thought, how about I display my designs in a pop-up? I still remember the morning of the pop-up, I was so nervous, like genuinely nervous because I didn't know how the response to the designs would be. I had displayed two designs then, one was Love and the other one was Karak, the Karak Chai. The pop-up started, people started walking in and I remember there were these three friends who stopped at my space, they looked at the Karak design and there was an instant smile on their faces. That just felt like a breeze of nostalgia and relatability and that feeling stayed with me, it stayed the entire day and I don't think it has left even today. It was my 38th birthday and I wanted to gift this to myself, so I put down my papers and one and a half years later, here I am. I'll not lie to you, running this business has just, it has been so hard, my hair is greying, I've gained a lot of weight and some days are genuinely just so difficult. Would you do it again? Would you do it again? Yes, a hundred times yes because this is terribly me and this is terribly real. Are we done? Yeah, okay. Oh, by the way, don't forget to shop at Sarnamshi.
